content:
• Evolve (Iterative Refinement)
    • Prompt: "Incorporate all feedback and refinements to create a polished, stronger, and more resilient final version of the content."
    • Example Output:
      • Polished Draft: Includes improved structure, logical coherence, emotional engagement, and reinforced credibility

    ---
    ---

    Flow: From Evaluation to Growth

    [Evaluation]
    ├─ Critique → Clear view of strengths and weaknesses
    ├─ Logos Review → Stronger logical and factual appeal
    ├─ Ethos Review → Greater reliability and trust
    └─ Pathos Review → Strong emotional connection
    ↓
    [Reinforcement]
    └─ Logic Check → Contradictions removed and coherence reinforced
    ↓
    [Risk Analysis]
    ├─ Identify Blind Spots → Lower risk of missed or unchallenged issues
    └─ Recognize Shatter Points → Better prevention of critical failures
context: From document: From Evaluation to Growth — chunk 11 (chunk 11/12)
